title: Darker Cobwebs
description: Darkens the cobweb textures so they can be more easily seen on bright surfaces without removing the vanilla look.
body:
### Darkens the cobweb textures so they aren't as hard on your eyes.

Uses colors from the tripwire and darkens the string texture to match. Also removes tripwire transparency so they're a bit easier to see!

**Great for UHC or SMP PvP or if you're mining a ton of cobwebs.**
![Cobwebs in an abandoned mineshaft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26dd94f8292b33962bca95c1b02b13008f163d82.png)
